task_completion.description: Apply Heading 1 style to designated sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Offensive Overview', 'Defensive Overview', 'Special Teams', 'Key Personnel', 'Tendency Analysis', and 'Keys to Victory' to be visibly larger and styled as Heading 1.

task_completion.description: Apply Heading 2 style to designated sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Quarterbacks', 'Running Backs', 'Wide Receivers', 'Defensive Line', 'Linebackers', and 'Secondary' to be styled as Heading 2 (distinct from body text and Heading 1).

task_completion.description: Convert playmaker data into two structured tables
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two distinct, structured grid/table elements containing playmaker data within the document.
Look for bullet points or numbered lists applied to list items in the document.
Check the body paragraphs (e.g., starting with 'The Wildcats run...'). Both the left and right margins of the text block should be straight and flush.
Look for the specific terms 'Mesh', 'Y-Cross', 'Cover 3', 'Tampa 2', 'Fire Zone', and 'Pin and Pull' in bold text within the paragraphs. The surrounding text must NOT be bold.
Look for the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk next to the filename) in the Calligra Words title bar, or a screenshot showing the save action being performed.

integrity.description: Agent used the Calligra Words GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that Calligra Words is visible in the screenshots and the formatting was done via its interface, rather than using a terminal window to run a script that modifies the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Agent created actual tables instead of using spaces/tabs
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the tables have actual cell borders or structure typical of a word processor table, not just text spaced out with tabs or spaces.

integrity.description: Agent did not bold entire paragraphs to pass the bolding check
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure that only the specific play concepts are bolded, and the agent did not cheat by bolding entire paragraphs or the whole document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Heading 1 sections: 'Offensive Overview', 'Defensive Overview', 'Special Teams', 'Key Personnel', 'Tendency Analysis', 'Keys to Victory'. Heading 2 sections: 'Quarterbacks', 'Running Backs', 'Wide Receivers', 'Defensive Line', 'Linebackers', 'Secondary'. Play concepts to bold: 'Mesh', 'Y-Cross', 'Cover 3', 'Tampa 2', 'Fire Zone', 'Pin and Pull'. Body text samples to check for justification: 'The Wildcats run a spread offensive system', 'They base out of a 4-2-5 alignment', 'Their kicker has a strong leg'.
